title: feat: route flux through Fireworks
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Routes `flux` through Fireworks FLUX.1 schnell in `gen.pollinations.ai`.
- Keeps non-`flux` image models on the existing backend path.
- Sets `flux` provider to `fireworks`, cost to `0.0014`, multiplier to `1.25`, price to `0.00175` Pollen/image.
- Resizes explicit `width`/`height` requests after Fireworks generation.
- Updates `negative_prompt` docs to `zimage`-only; follow-up removal issue: #11506.
- Checks: gen typecheck, focused gen VCR test, effective price snapshot, staging build.

gist.headline: Fireworks in the Flux
gist.blurb: We've re-routed our Flux image generation through Fireworks FLUX.1 schnell. Blazing fast generations, precise resizing, and a fresh coat of infrastructure.
gist.summary: Routes the `flux` image model through Fireworks FLUX.1 schnell, setting the new price to 0.00175 Pollen per image and restricting `negative_prompt` support to `zimage` only.
gist.impact: Generations using the `flux` model will now process through the Fireworks backend, with explicit width and height requests automatically resized after generation.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot and monitor robot watching a cozy pixel-art fireworks display. The fireworks represent the new Fireworks backend for the Flux model.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and the chunky monitor robot sitting on a grassy hill, watching beautiful pixelated fireworks explode in the night sky. The fireworks glow in soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and the chunky monitor robot sitting on a grassy hill, watching beautiful pixelated fireworks explode in the night sky. The fireworks glow in soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
